diagrams.title: Key Hierarchy in Relational Model
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy from Superkey to Primary Key and Foreign Key
diagrams.purpose: Understand relationship between different types of keys and their properties

diagrams.title: Referential Integrity Action Types
diagrams.description: Visual representation of referential integrity actions when parent row is deleted
elements: SET NULL - Set FK to NULL
SET DEFAULT - Set FK to default
diagrams.purpose: Remember different referential actions and their effects on database

diagrams.title: Entity-Relationship to Relational Mapping Example
diagrams.description: Shows how ER diagram (Student enrolls in Course) maps to relational schema
diagrams.purpose: Understand practical application of constraints in database design
